name: write_guide_info
short_description: Write placement information of instances and terms
full_help:
write_guide_info

Description: 
Write placement information of instances and terms

Syntax: 
write_guide_info  [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
name of the output file

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      file name

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
